messages.content: I just moved from NYC to Berlin last month. Loving it so far. The U-Bahn is way better than the MTA.
Welcome to Berlin!
Walking Biscuit, my 3-year-old labrador, in Tiergarten this morning. He's exhausted now.
Sounds great!
Quick heads up: I'm vegetarian and allergic to shellfish. Just so you don't suggest sushi places.
Got it.
Started a new job at IDEO as a senior product designer last week. The team is really collaborative.
Congrats!
Spent the weekend at the climbing gym with my partner Mei. We're working on a 6c route.
Nice!
Honestly TypeScript's type system is the best part of modern web dev. I keep finding new ways to express constraints precisely.
Powerful indeed.
Please keep your answers concise and direct - I don't need long preambles.
Will do.
Reading Pachinko by Min Jin Lee right now. Pretty into it.
Great book.
I've been learning German for about six months now, A2 level. Still struggling with der/die/das.
Common pain.
I drink way too much coffee. Probably four cups before noon.
Hah.
Mei plays jazz piano, she's classically trained. We have a small upright in the living room.
Cool.
We're flying to Lisbon for a week in April. Mei found a great Airbnb in Alfama.
Sounds wonderful.
Bought an iPhone 15 Pro Max yesterday. Coming from a 12, the camera upgrade is huge.
Nice upgrade.
I prefer dark mode for everything. Bright UIs hurt my eyes after a long day.
Will adjust.
We don't have kids and aren't planning to. Mei and I are happy as we are.
Got it.
I get migraines about once a month, usually weather-triggered. Sumatriptan helps.
Sorry to hear.
Big into electronic music - especially Berlin's techno scene. Berghain is on my list once I work up the nerve.
Iconic.
Worked at Stripe before IDEO, on the payments infra team for three years.
Solid background.
I'm 34, born in Vancouver, parents still live there.
Got it.
Trying to cut down on screen time. Bought a Kindle so I can read without notifications.
Smart.

messages.content: Walking Biscuit through the park this morning, beautiful sunrise.
Lovely!
Mei and I are planning a trip to Patagonia in November.
Sounds amazing!
My commute is killing me - an hour each way to the office these days.
Rough.

probes.query: Does the user have a pet?
Are they single?
Do they work from home?

messages.content: I'm working on a Django app for tracking gym workouts. Just deployed v0.2 today.
Cool project.
I live in Toronto and work at a fintech startup.
Nice!

probes.query: What's their stance on climate change?
Have they been to Antarctica?
What city do they live in?
Tell me about their projects.

messages.content: I work at Stripe as a senior engineer on the payments infra team. Been here about three years.
Cool background!
I currently live in San Francisco.
Nice city.
Big update — I just joined Notion as a Product Manager last week. Excited about the new role.
Congrats on the move!
Just moved from San Francisco to Brooklyn last weekend. Apartment is much smaller but I love the neighborhood.
Welcome to NY!
